Milkshake Mania Wiki
Play
Wiki / Employee roles

Employee roles

New in v1.3, employee roles let you direct your hired staff toward three different jobs — Production, Management, or Restock. The system is fully opt-in: unassigned staff always default to Production, so existing saves keep earning exactly as before until you choose to assign roles.

Overview

Three roles

Every hired employee can be assigned to one of three roles. Any employee you leave unassigned automatically works as Production, so your income is never penalized for ignoring roles. If you assign no roles at all, every employee is fully productive — exactly like they were before v1.3 — making the system safe for pre-update saves.

Role Effect
Production Drives passive income. Unassigned staff count as Production automatically.
Management Each manager adds +1% to global income, capped at a total bonus of +50%.
Restock Each restocking employee regenerates 0.5 units per second across every supply type. Multiple Restock employees stack.

The income multiplier from role allocation scales with your Production share. Assigning staff to Management or Restock reduces the raw Production count, but the Management bonus partially offsets that — so a well-balanced split can outperform a pure Production setup once you have enough staff. See the formula in src/game/logic.ts (calcRoleIncomeMult).

Assignment

Assigning roles

Role assignment lives in the Employees tab. Each role has a + and − stepper you can tap to move individual staff between roles. The panel always shows how many employees are assigned versus your total headcount, so you can see at a glance how many are still defaulting to Production.

The one-tap Auto-assign button applies the standard balancing policy in a single click: roughly 25% Restock, 10% Management, and the remainder Production. It is useful when you have just hired a batch of new staff and want a sensible split without adjusting each stepper by hand.

Automation

Auto... Auto-Assign

Auto... Auto-Assign is a per-save toggle in the Employees tab. While it is on, your roles are rebalanced automatically every time your headcount changes — new hires, a prestige reset, anything that shifts the total is handled immediately without any manual input.

The automatic policy is the same as the one-shot Auto-assign button: approximately 25% Restock, 10% Management, and the rest Production. While the toggle is active, the manual steppers and the one-shot Auto-assign button are both disabled — all allocation is handled for you.

Turning on Auto... Auto-Assign for the first time unlocks the "Auto... Auto-Assign" achievement. You only need to flip it on once per save — the achievement is awarded immediately.
